mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM BOX_MST WHERE ISUSE = 'Y'
AND box_nm LIKE '%' #{searchKeyword} '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT box_mst ( BOX_CD, BOX_NM, BOX_COUNT, BOX_PRICE, DEPOSIT, HIGH_NUM, ROW_NUM, START_NUM, END_NUM, reg_dt, reg_id, ISUSE ) VALUES ( #{boxCd}, #{boxNm}, #{boxCount}, #{boxPrice}, #{deposit}, #{highNum}, #{rowNum}, #{startNum}, #{endNum}, now(), #{regId}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOX_MST SET BOX_NM = #{boxNm}, BOX_COUNT = #{boxCount}, BOX_PRICE = #{boxPrice}, DEPOSIT = #{deposit}, HIGH_NUM = #{highNum}, ROW_NUM = #{rowNum}, START_NUM = #{startNum}, END_NUM = #{endNum}, upd_dt = now(), upd_id = #{updId} WHERE BOX_CD = #{boxCd}
mapper.select: SELECT BOX_CD, BOX_NUM, a.USER_ID, b.USER_NM, BOX_FLAG, UPD_DT, UPD_ID, RENT_SEQ FROM box_info a LEFT OUTER JOIN MEMBER_MST b ON a.USER_ID = b.USER_ID WHERE a.BOX_CD = #{boxCd} ORDER BY a.BOX_NUM ASC
